# Nuptials

*[Camus](../philosophers/camus.md) · 1939*

A collection of short lyrical essays in which [Camus](../philosophers/camus.md) celebrates a sensual communion with the earth, sun and sea of Algeria. He affirms a carnal happiness anchored in the [immanence](../glossary/immanence.md) of the sensible world, expecting nothing of any beyond.
